news.title: GlobalFoundries (GFS) Launches Dedicated Quantum Technology Solutions Unit
news.summary: GlobalFoundries Inc. (NASDAQ:GFS) is one of the best multibagger stocks to buy in 2026. On May 21, GlobalFoundries launched Quantum Technology Solutions to scale domestic manufacturing for utility-scale quantum computing. The new business will manufacture complete hardware solutions (including quantum processor units/QPUs, cryogenic read-out ICs, and advanced packaging), marking GF’s entry into next-generation high-performance computing. Shares of trading platforms  Coinbase Global  and  Robinhood Markets  were down 3.8% and 2.7%, respectively.
